texto: Work is a blessing when it helps us to think about what we are doing
autor: but it becomes a curse when its sole use is to stop us thinking about the meaning of life.
explicacao: Citação de but it becomes a curse when its sole use is to stop us thinking about the meaning of life. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Work is a blessing when it helps us to think about what we are doing” articula reflexao, paulo-coelho, blessing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
